title: Leading scorer Baker-Mazara no longer with USC
content: Chad Baker-Mazara is no longer a member of the men's basketball program, USC announced, a day after he left the Trojans' loss to Nebraska.

title: Colorado QB Ponder dies in single-car crash at 23
content: Colorado quarterback Dominiq Ponder died early Sunday morning in a single-car crash, according to police. He was 23.

title: Reddick wins 3rd straight to make NASCAR history
content: Tyler Reddick became the first driver in NASCAR Cup Series history to win the first three races of the season with a victory Sunday at the Circuit of the Americas.

title: UConn finishes off perfect 31-0 regular season
content: No. 1 UConn completed its 11th undefeated regular season Sunday night, positioning itself nine wins from repeating as national champion.

title: Curry (knee) sidelined at least five more games
content: Warriors star Stephen Curry will sit out at least the next five games because of his persistent right knee issue, the team announced Sunday.

title: Echavarria wins Cognizant after Lowry collapse
content: Nico Echavarria, who was three shots back with three holes left, shot a 5-under 66 on Sunday to win at PGA National, finishing at 17-under 267 and beating Shane Lowry, who had two double bogeys in his final three holes.

title: Messi's first goals of season inspire big Miami rally
content: Lionel Messi scored twice in a four-goal second half, defender Telasco Segovia added a goal and two assists and defending champion Inter Miami CF rallied to beat Orlando City SC 4-2 on Sunday night.

title: Sources: Vikings to trade or cut Jones, Hargrave
content: The Vikings have informed running back Aaron Jones and defensive tackle Javon Hargrave that, barring a trade, they will be released at the start of the 2026 league year, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: Iran federation says participation in WC in doubt
content: The president of Iran's soccer federation says he does not know if the national team can play World Cup matches in the United States following the surprise U.S. and Israeli bombardment of his country.

title: Women's Bracketology: Welcome to the top 16, Minnesota
content: Sunday's reveal put a new team in the top 16. The start of Champ Week will bring more answers as the bracket comes into focus.

title: New intel on the QB market, potential trades and top NFL free agents: What we heard at the combine
content: What will the Vikings, Cardinals, Colts and Dolphins do at QB? Has the A.J. Brown and Maxx Crosby trade buzz quieted? Which free agents are getting interest?

title: Heaps, Shaw lead USWNT to win over Argentina
content: Lindsey Heaps had a goal and an assist, and Jaedyn Shaw also scored to propel the United States to a sixth straight shutout victory with a 2-0 win over Argentina in the SheBelieves Cup on Sunday.

title: Men's Bubble Watch: Ohio State improves its chances, Indiana doesn't
content: A mixed Big Ten Sunday gives bubble teams Ohio State and Indiana different outlooks on their at-large cases.

title: Takeaways: Only one surprising outcome at Elimination Chamber
content: The title matchups for WrestleMania 42 are nearly set, but there is only one pairing that we didn't see coming.

title: Arsenal riding corner kicks to title; Chelsea red card problems continue
content: Arsenal may be the most dominant corner-kick team the Premier League has ever seen. Meanwhile, Chelsea keep hurting themselves with red cards.

title: Man United go third as Sesko continues hot streak of crucial goals
content: United are flying and so is Benjamin Sesko, whose latest effort was a game winner against Crystal Palace.

title: Your guide to the Unrivaled playoffs: Breeze and Vinyl advance to semifinals
content: The Phantom will face the Vinyl and the Mist play the Breeze in the semifinals on Monday in Brooklyn.

title: Inside the secret history of the black mamba
content: In late 2002, Nike began creating a global campaign featuring the black mamba -- and presented it to an NBA superstar. That star was not Kobe Bryant.

title: Draft guide: Rankings, tips, strategy, stats and more
content: All the rankings, projections, cheat sheets, strategy and analysis you need for the 2026 fantasy baseball season.

title: Hannah Green hangs on for second LPGA Singapore title
content: Hannah Green nearly opened the door for a fast-finishing Auston Kim but held on to win the HSBC Women's World Championship by one stroke.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Will Kane, Vinícius extend their contracts?
content: Bayern Munich want striker Harry Kane to sign a new contract, and Real Madrid want the same for Vinícius Júnior. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: 4.18 lakh students set to appear for SSLC, 4.52 lakh for Plus Two exams in Kerala
content: SSLC exams begin on March 5 and Plus Two exams on March 6. Minister V. Sivankutty says SSLC results will be announced by third week of May and Plus Two results expected on May 22

title: Rajya Sabha polls: No deadlock in MVA talks; lone seat should go to Sena UBT, says Aaditya Thackeray
content: The Rajya Sabha polls for the seven seats in Maharashtra will be held on March 16, 2026 and votes will be counted on the same day

title: Andhra Pradesh Government initiates measures to ensure safe return of Telugu people stranded in Gulf Nations
content: “State Government is closely monitoring the evolving situation, particularly after reported disruptions at certain international airports that have caused inconvenience to passengers,” says Minister for NRI Empowerment Affairs

title: ‘Vishwanath & Sons’: Suriya-Venky Atluri film gets a title
content: Suriya’s latest film with director Venky Atluri has been officially titled ‘Vishwanath & Sons’, and the first-look poster gives nostalgic vibes with Suriya and a child sharing the spotlight

title: Israel-Iran conflict: Keralite expatriates in Gulf face heightened anxiety and fear amid escalating tensions in West Asia
content: The situation not only affects those abroad but also worries families in Kerala, who are concerned for their loved ones amidst the regional conflict

title: Girl administered injection at medical store in UP's Gorakhpur, dies
content: “The incident took place on March 1 evening. The deceased, Divya, a resident of Masuriya village under the Bansgaon police station area, was suffering from a mild cough and fever,” says police

title: India and Canada ink landmark agreement on cooperation in supplies of uranium
content: Modi and Carney discussed on the precarious security situation in West Asia, with Mr. Modi asserting that India supports resolution of all conflicts through dialogue and diplomacy

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election: VCK seeks 12 seats as starting point in talks with DMK
content: Speaking to reporters at Anna Arivalayam after holding seat-sharing talks with the ruling party, Mr. Thirumavalavan expressed confidence that the Congress will remain in the DMK-led alliance

title: 24x7 Control Room numbers for Telangana residents in affected regions of West Asia
content: The Government has already received calls from the people in the affected countries and family members.

title: Ajit Pawar's son shares video alleging VSR Ventures owner slept in pilot’s seat; demands arrest
content: Jay Pawar also demanded that all aircraft of VSR Ventures be grounded till the inquiry into his father's plane crash is completed

title: Two schools get bomb threat emails in Punjab's Jalandhar
content: Police, fire brigade officials, bomb squads, dog squads and ambulances were rushed to the school premises

title: Israel-Iran conflict: Kerala postpones SSLC, Plus 2 examinations in West Asia region
content: SSLC exams to be conducted on March 5 and higher secondary examinations to be held on March 5, 6, and 7 have been postponed. New dates to be announced later, says Kerala’s Minister for General Education V. Sivankutty

title: Nagpur factory blast: Nine directors of explosives company arrested
content: Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis has ordered a thorough investigation into the cause of the explosion

title: Iran-Israel conflict: 24 flights cancelled at Bengaluru airport
content: The key sectors to which flight service were affected include: Abu Dhabi, Riyadh, Jeddah, Dammam, Dubai and Doha.

title: Ex-parliamentarian and academician Janardan Waghmare dies
content: He was a close aide to NCP founder Sharad Pawar and had been widely acknowledged for his lifelong contribution to education, literature and public service

title: 109 persons from Karnataka stranded in West Asia as airspace closure disrupts flights
content: Relief Commissioner and Principal Secretary to the Revenue Department (Disaster Management) Munish Moudgil has urged people from Karnataka residing in the affected countries to strictly follow local advisories, contact Indian missions, and register on the Sarthi Sahayata portal

title: Panic, anger ripple across Matua belt as SIR deletions reopen citizenship faultlines before Bengal polls
content: In Thakurnagar, the Matua sect's spiritual headquarters, residents possess Aadhaar, ration and voter cards but many fear these could be rendered meaningless as many availed these documents illegally and now their names have been deleted from the rolls

title: Three schools in Delhi receive bomb threat; security check underway
content: In a message to parents, Sardar Patel Vidyalaya informed parents that students have been evacuated safely

title: ‘Manjummel Boys’ director Chidambaram booked for sexual harassment following actor’s complaint
content: Complainant has accused the director of sexually misbehaving with her reportedly at an apartment in Kochi in 2022

title: Janawadi Mahila Sanghatane to stage protest at Freedom Park in Bengaluru on March 5 over policies impacting women, farmers, labourers and senior citizens
content: Highlighting the growing burden of microfinance loans, the activists said women borrowers were often trapped in debt at interest rates as high as 25-30%, leading to harassment, sexual exploitation, and suicide

title: Amazon India slashes seller referral fees in retail growth push
content: Amazon said in December that it would invest ⁠more than $35 billion in India by 2030, looking to expand its AI infrastructure

title: Odisha Police declare 2 more districts Maoist-free
content: The 15 Maoists surrendered at a function held in Chhattisgarh's Mahasamund district, which borders Bargarh. Three senior Odisha Police officers were present at the event

title: Airtel, Google partner to check spam in messages
content: Sameer Samat, President, Android Ecosystem at Google, said that brands leveraging the messaging service for enterprise communications will be able to foster trust amongst their customers

title: ‘Special Intensive Revision is turning millions of voters into outsiders in their own country’
content: Two events organised in Kalaburagi to create awareness about Special Intensive Revision and its impact on voters

title: Kerala’s people’s plan campaign: key lessons and the road ahead
content: The foremost goal of the People’s Plan Campaign (PPC) in Kerala is to deepen democracy by empowering the Local Governments (LGs) and expanding the space for citizen’s participation in governance.

title: Madhya Pradesh CM Yadav releases gharials, turtles at Kuno National Park
content: Nine cheetahs airlifted from Botswana were released into the national park on Saturday, taking their number to 48

title: Will leverage tech to crack down on market manipulators, says SEBI chief
content: SEBI Chairman Tuhin Kanta Pandey says the market regulator is using AI to reach out to more investors for awareness; he urges people to use tools such as SEBI Check to deter fraudsters and warns against financial influencers promising astronomical returns; he says SEBI will make sure there is no instability in the markets

title: PM Modi speaks with Netanyahu to discuss current regional situation in West Asia
content: PM Modi reiterated the need for an end of hostilities in West Asia following the U.S.-Israeli joint attack on Iran

title: Chief Minister to inaugurate Critical Care Block in Jawadhu Hills
content: Health officials said that the new single-storey facility, which will cover around 5,000 sq.ft, has 50 beds with separate wards for maternity, newborn care, and in-patients

title: ‘Work with courage, take risks, face probe agencies’: Sisodia rallies AAP cadre
content: Give blood, sweat to remove Modi, instal Kejriwal as PM, says party leader; AAP rule delivered no development: BJP; both parties complicit, says Cong. after being denied permission to stage stir

title: Killing of Khamenei and attack on Iran signal the revival of regime-change doctrine and coercive unilateralism: Kharge
content: The Congress president stresses targeted killing of a sitting head of state strikes at the heart of international rules; sovereignty is not conditional, and political legitimacy cannot be manufactured through force, he asserts.

title: From the valley to the pinnacle of domestic cricket — the J & K story
content: Jammu & Kashmir’s stellar run is a tale of grit, determination and meticulous preparation; it had all bases covered and every member of the squad put his hand up when it mattered most; the next challenge for Dogra’s men will be to sustain the momentum and stay at the summit

title: ‘India stands in solidarity’: PM Modi speaks to UAE President, condemns attacks on Gulf nation
content: PM Modi also thanked the UAE President for taking care of the Indian community living in the Gulf nation, and said New Delhi supports de-escalation, regional peace, security and stability

title: A map to guide you to places in Bengaluru where pink Tabebuia are in full bloom
content: The bloom-tracking system works through a community-driven model supported by two data sources: GBA’s census data and user contributions

title: Fire breaks out at Nellore GGH, no casualties reported
content: Short-circuit in maternity ward triggers blaze; patients shifted to other blocks and private hospital as Collector and SP oversee relief measures

title: Indians among those injured in Iranian strikes, says UAE
content: Ongoing conflict between U.S.-Israel alliance and Iran send waves across West Asia; oil tanker with Indians among crew hit off Oman, passengers stranded as flight disruptions; 8 Indians stuck in Karachi airport after aircraft diversion over the conflict

title: 463 trees of 34 species: Cost of Orange Line Metro realignment in Nagarabhavi
content: According to the original plan, the initial alignment passed along the Outer Ring Road, from Dwaraka Nagar station to Chowdeshwari Nagar station, which residents claimed will have resulted in at least 90% less environmental destruction

title: BJP begins campaign for Bengal Assembly elections with Parivartan Yatras
content: Senior party leaders flag off four Parivartan Yatras in four different corners of the State. On March 2, five more will be flagged off in the State. All nine yatras will conclude with a public rally of Prime Minister Narendra Modi at Kolkata’s Brigade Parade Grounds

title: Opposition parties condemn killing of Iran's leader Khamenei as ‘immoral, unlawful’
content: In Jammu and Kashmir, various parties, including the ruling National Conference, also deplored the U.S.-Israel attacks on Iran

title: Amit Shah asks Punjab govt. to act against ‘religious conversions’
content: Amit Shah invokes the sacrifice of Guru Tegh Bahadur while addressing the ‘Hind-Di-Chadar’ event to mark the 350th martyrdom anniversary of Guru Tegh Bahadur in Kharghar

title: Indian airlines cancel 350 flights to West Asia and beyond
content: The UAE announces it will cover accommodation and sustenance costs for stranded passengers in the wake of the war between Israel-U.S. and Iran

title: Maharashtra-Canada ties poised for dynamic growth: Fadnavis
content: At Mumbai reception for Canadian leaders, Maharashtra Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis pitches State as hub for infrastructure, AI, climate finance, and higher education investment.

title: INFINITUS 2026 concludes on a high note at SRM University A.P.
content: Over 6,500 students from across the country take part in four-day techno-cultural extravaganza featuring performances by Karthik and Jonita Gandhi

title: Congress slams Vijayawada MP over stalled flyovers, bypass
content: Kolanukonda Shivaji seeks action on Singh Nagar and Nidamanuru corridor projects amid worsening traffic congestion

title: MHA cautions States against possible violence in the wake of U.S.-Israel military strikes against Iran
content: As thousands took to the streets to protest Khamenei’s killing, MHA asked States to watch protests by friends and foes of the Iranian regime, monitor radicals; says likely targets are embassies, tourist sites

title: GBA and BDA to draft separate Revised Master Plan
content: The new draft is only expected in 2027, which will be 12 years after the last Revised Master Plan was due. The master plan in force was drafted in 2005.

title: DMK Ministers competing among themselves to indulge in scams: PM Modi
content: Contending that the NDA would give a clean and efficient government, he sought the ouster of the “corrupt and anti-people” DMK government

title: ‘Sleaze’ video: TTD Chairman B.R. Naidu warns of action against those resorting to smear campaign
content: He dismissed as uncivilised the attempts of YSRCP leader Bhumana Karnunakar Reddy to tarnish his image

title: Kerala Chief Minister’s moment with young landslide survivor takes political turn
content: The child had gained national attention after Prime Minister’s interaction with her during his visit to a hospital in Wayanad soon after the Mundakkai-Chooralmala landslides

title: Chief Justice of India Surya Kant stresses on building a ‘mediation culture’ for resolving disputes amicably
content: It is gaining greater acceptance as an effective tool for dispute resolution, and the process has statutory backup in the Mediation Act of 2023, he observes; Chief Minister Chandrababu Naidu urges the CJI to consider establishing National Judicial Academy in Amaravati

title: Kakani, Somireddy trade charges over ₹100 crore land row in Nellore
content: YSRCP leader alleges sale of 40 acres of government land worth ₹100 crore; Sarvepalli MLA denies charge, says disputed land will be handed over to NUDA for NTR Township development

title: Work on beach circuit project linking Kuzhipilly, Cherai and Munambam begins
content: The long-awaited circuit was initially proposed in 2017 as part of a broader plan to promote beach tourism in Ernakulam district

title: Heavy rush at Kanaka Durga temple, arrangements in place for Maha Kumbhabhishekam
content: Preparations in full swing for Maha Kumbhabhishekam, a grand ritual held once every 12 years at Sri Durga Malleswara Swamy Devasthanam; the three-day event is scheduled from March 6 to 8 this year

title: Swachh Bharat: Who will empty the 44 lakh toilet pits?
content: Under Swachh Bharat Mission (Gramin), Karnataka has reported constructing over 44 lakh toilets in rural areas. Nearly 92% of these are single-leach pit structures, which need human intervention in emptying

title: Andhra Pradesh achieves record GST collection in February 2026
content: The 5.45% growth compared to February 2025 signals a robust economic trajectory despite significant tax cuts introduced under the GST 2.0, says official

title: 'Matter of grave concern': PM Modi calls for dialogue and diplomacy as Middle East tensions soar
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi voiced deep concern over the escalating Middle East situation. This follows significant military action by the United States and Israel against Iran. The strikes led to the death of Iran's Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. India will work with regional nations to ensure the safety of its citizens.

title: US F-15 down in Kuwait? Iran shares video showing fighter jet engulfed in flames, pilots ejecting
content: US F-15 Fighter Jet Crash: An American F-15 fighter jet crashed in Kuwait amid escalating Middle East tensions following the killing of Iran's Supreme Leader. While Iran's state media claimed the jet was shot down, the exact cause remains unconfirmed. Both crew members reportedly survived and were handed over to Kuwaiti authorities

title: Satellite images show damage at US Fifth Fleet naval base in Bahrain's Manama; see before-after pics
content: Iran unleashed retaliatory strikes across the Middle East, targeting key cities like Dubai and Sharjah, and Bahrain's US Fifth Fleet naval base. These actions followed the killing of Iran's Supreme Leader in a US-Israeli operation. The widespread attacks, described by Iran as defensive, have heightened regional tensions and prompted air defense activations.

title: 1970s-style oil shock loading? Crude may hit $100 if Strait of Hormuz shuts - what it means
content: Global oil markets are preparing for potential supply disruptions after US airstrikes on Iran over the weekend revived concerns that shipments through the Strait of Hormuz could be affected.

title: Telegram CEO Pavel Durov has a 'Europe message' for everyone worried about UAE
content: Telegram CEO Pavel Durov has sparked debate by claiming Dubai is statistically safer than Europe, despite regional tensions. He sarcastically noted missing "free fireworks from Iran" while in Europe, citing higher crime rates there. The UAE confirmed casualties from recent missile and drone attacks, leading to diplomatic action.

title: $50 bn trade target: India, Canada move closer to trade deal during Carney's visit
content: India and Canada aim to boost bilateral trade to $50 billion by 2030, accelerating negotiations on a Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement (CEPA). Leaders discussed critical minerals, uranium, and defense cooperation, with several MoUs exchanged, including those on CEPA Terms of Reference and critical mineral collaboration.

title: Mission England: Gambhir demands ‘special effort’ as India gear up for semi-final
content: Gautam Gambhir praised Sanju Samson's match-winning 97 against the West Indies, highlighting his potential. However, the focus now shifts to the T20 World Cup semi-final against a formidable England side in Mumbai. Gambhir emphasized that India will require a 'special effort' and flawless execution to overcome the unbeaten English team.

title: Protest erupts in Srinagar over Khamenei killing; tear gas used
content: Police deployed tear gas to disperse protesters in Kashmir following the reported killing of Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. Mobile internet services were also slowed as authorities imposed restrictions across districts to maintain law and order amid demonstrations.

title: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan: I was shocked to find China's Huawei has hired engineers who can...
content: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan expressed shock at Huawei's 100+ CPU architects, developing alternatives to advanced chip tools and lithography. He warned China is rapidly closing the semiconductor gap through engineering and infrastructure optimization, even excelling in open-source AI. Tan urged the US against complacency, stating China could soon lead.

title: Mercedes-Benz V-Class launched at Rs 1.4 crore, takes on Vellfire
content: . Globally, the V-Class is offered with two wheelbase choices - Long at 3,200mm and Extra Long measuring 3,430mm. The Indian market gets extra long variant with the AMG line exterior package. Buyers can choose from five exterior colour options and two interior colour themes.

title: Total lunar eclipse: When and where to watch the celestial event; IMD shares locations, timings
content: India will witness a spectacular total lunar eclipse on Tuesday, March 3, 2026. This deep celestial event, where the Moon fully enters Earth's shadow, will be visible across the nation. While most of India will see the latter stages at moonrise, parts of the Northeast and Andaman and Nicobar Islands will catch the end of totality.

title: Amazon's datacentre in UAE reports fire; company confirms one of its availability zones impacted
content: Amazon's UAE data center faced a temporary shutdown after 'objects struck' a facility, causing sparks and a fire. Firefighters cut power, impacting services like EC2 and RDS. While AWS didn't confirm a link to regional strikes, the incident disrupted operations, with restoration efforts underway.

title: Israel bombs Hezbollah targets in Beirut; Gulf nations vow to defend themselves — key points
content: A joint US-Israeli strike has killed Iran's Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, igniting regional retaliation.  Israel and Hezbollah exchanged fire, while Gulf states braced for attacks.  Global markets plunged amid escalating fears of a wider conflict, with travel disruptions and stock market crashes reported across the Middle East.

title: ‘He showed his true potential’: Gambhir lauds Samson after Eden masterclass
content: Gautam Gambhir lauded Sanju Samson's unbeaten 97 against the West Indies, calling it a glimpse of his true potential. Samson's composed innings guided India to the T20 World Cup semifinals, showcasing his world-class talent and silencing past criticisms. Gambhir expressed confidence in Samson's ability to build on this match-winning performance.

title: Stock market today: How Dalal Street reacted to Middle East tensions
content: Stock market crash today: Nifty50 and BSE Sensex crashed in opening trade on Monday amidst rising Middle East tensions and global market turmoil, with impact on crude oil prices and trade in focus.

title: NHL Trade Rumors: $25 million price tag fuels speculation of Leafs-Oilers blockbuster
content: The Toronto Maple Leafs are weighing serious trade interest in winger Bobby McMann as their season slips. With Edmonton leading the chase and contract talks stalled over a reported $5 million AAV ask, Toronto is carefully evaluating offers ahead of the March 6 deadline. Management is not acting out of panic but seeking meaningful return, while multiple teams monitor McMann’s availability.

title: Philadelphia 76ers vs Boston Celtics injury report: head-to-head records and team stats
content: The Philadelphia 76ers face the Boston Celtics at TD Garden on March 1, 2026, in a crucial Atlantic Division matchup. Both teams are significantly impacted by injuries, with Joel Embiid out for Philadelphia and Jayson Tatum still sidelined for Boston. This short-handed contest will heavily feature Tyrese Maxey for the 76ers and Jaylen Brown for the Celtics.

title: George Kittle’s wife Claire stuns in 49ers-red bikini after SI spotlight
content: Claire Kittle has captured offseason attention with a striking red bikini post following her Sports Illustrated Swimsuit shoot, while George Kittle faces rehab after a torn Achilles. Despite retirement speculation as he nears 33, the 49ers tight end remains determined to return, declaring his love for football and joking that his wife will decide when he is done. Together, the Kittles balance recovery, resilience, and rising visibility.

title: Watch: How Iran missile slipped past interceptor rockets to strike target
content: A viral video purportedly shows an Iranian missile evading multiple interceptors over Jerusalem, raising concerns about Tehran's advanced missile capabilities. Experts suggest the missile might be Iran's Fattah system, designed for maneuverability to counter air defenses. Iran possesses a vast arsenal, increasingly focusing on precision and survivability to bolster its regional deterrence.

title: Gold price prediction: How will gold prices react this week to Middle East tensions?
content: Gold price prediction today: Rising tensions in the Middle East and developments around US, Israel and Iran are expected to keep gold prices volatile this week, says Manav Modi, Senior Analyst, Commodity Research at Motilal Oswal Financial Services Ltd.

title: ‘Poor tactics’: Key reasons behind Pakistan’s early T20 World Cup ouster
content: Pakistan's T20 World Cup journey ended prematurely due to a lack of consistency and questionable decision-making. Despite favorable conditions, the team faltered, with tactical errors and batting struggles costing them dearly. Captain Salman Ali Agha acknowledged pressure impacts their choices, while promising a review of leadership. Promising performances from Farhan and Tariq offered glimmers of hope amidst the disappointment.

title: Defence stocks surge on Middle East tensions! HAL, BEL, Paras Defence rise up to 13%
content: ​​The escalation has raised expectations of increased export opportunities and strengthened investor sentiment toward the sector. Paras Defence led the gains, climbing 13.5%. Meanwhile, HAL, BEL and Bharat Dynamics advanced by up to 3.5% on the BSE.

title: Drunk youth drags cop on Mercedes bonnet for 800m in Telangana; arrested
content: A drunk youth, booked for rash driving and attempting to murder a policeman, rammed another vehicle and sped away with the officer clinging to his car's bonnet in Gachibowli. The 24-year-old, with a BAC of 160 mg/100 ml, was eventually apprehended by the public after a dangerous chase.

title: MHA alerts states as Middle East tensions soar; internet curbs, security tightened in Kashmir
content: The Ministry of Home Affairs has alerted states to potential tensions due to the Iran conflict, urging vigilance against inflammatory religious gatherings and radical preachers. Authorities are monitoring individuals and groups to prevent unrest, with precautionary measures already implemented in Jammu and Kashmir following protests over the killing of Iran's supreme leader.

title: Taliban strike multiple military bases in Pakistan; strategic Nur Khan Airbase in Rawalpindi hit
content: Afghanistan's Air Force launched drone strikes on key Pakistani military bases, including Nur Khan Airbase and Quetta's 12th Corps HQ. This retaliatory action follows Pakistan's recent aerial incursions into Afghan territory. Both nations have engaged in escalating tit-for-tat clashes, with Pakistan claiming significant Taliban fighter casualties and Afghanistan asserting the downing of a Pakistani jet.

title: Dominiq Ponder death: Deion Sanders mourns Dominiq Ponder, Colorado QB
content: Colorado Buffaloes coach Deion Sanders paid tribute to quarterback Dominiq Ponder after his tragic death. Sanders focused on Ponder's character, calling him a born leader and one of his favorites. The coach's message highlighted faith and respect, reflecting his program's emphasis on personal growth and accountability. Ponder, a transfer, was valued for his presence within the team.

title: Satellite images show impact of Iran missile and drone attacks on Dubai
content: Following the killing of its Supreme Leader, Iran launched retaliatory strikes across the Middle East, targeting American military bases and Israel. Dubai, a symbol of modern opulence, was also hit, with iconic landmarks like the Burj Al Arab and vital infrastructure such as Dubai International Airport sustaining damage amidst widespread attacks.

title: ‘Good things happen to good people who wait’: Surya’s emotional tribute to Samson
content: Sanju Samson's spectacular unbeaten 97 guided India to a thrilling five-wicket victory over the West Indies at Eden Gardens, securing a T20 World Cup semifinal spot.  Skipper Suryakumar Yadav lauded Samson's patience and hard work, highlighting the team's character under pressure.  This crucial win sets up a semi-final clash against England.

title: Civil aviation ministry activates PACR as airlines suspend West Asia flights
content: India's aviation authorities are actively assisting passengers affected by flight disruptions in West Asia. The Passenger Assistance Control Room has resolved 411 grievances by coordinating with airlines and airports, while also sharing embassy helpline numbers. Several airlines have extended flight suspensions due to safety concerns and airspace restrictions.

title: Watch: Israel uses Iron Beam to intercept rockets midair for first time — how it works
content: Hezbollah launched a wave of strikes across the Middle East following the death of Iran's Supreme Leader, targeting Israel. Israel's newly operational Iron Beam defence system intercepted some incoming missiles, marking its first-ever use. This laser-based technology, designed to neutralize smaller aerial threats, complements existing air defense networks.

title: Stars stranded as West Asia erupts: First-person account from Dubai
content: Dubai, once a vibrant hub for top-tier tennis, now resembles a ghost town following escalating West Asian tensions. Coordinated strikes triggered widespread retaliation, leading to major airspace closures and thousands of stranded travelers. Even renowned athletes are caught in the disruption, with flights cancelled and routes blocked, creating an anxious atmosphere.

title: Lunar Eclipse on Holi 2026: Date, sutak time, visibility in India and significance of Chandra Grahan
content: A rare Chandra Grahan, or Lunar Eclipse, will grace the skies on March 3, 2026, coinciding with the vibrant Holi festival. This celestial event, also known as a Blood Moon, will be visible across India. Astrologically, Holika Dahan is advised after the eclipse concludes on March 3rd, following the Sutak kaal.

title: Cardi B hints at heartbreak as Stefon Diggs faces legal trouble
content: Stefon Diggs, the New England Patriots' star player, and Cardi B decided to end things between them just hours before Super Bowl LX. While the reason behind their controversial break up remains unknown, it seems the popular Grammy winner Cardi B has now hinted at the pain and betrayal she felt in her year long high profile relationship with Stefon Diggs.

title: Khamenei dead, who will lead Iran? Trump says ‘three very good choices’
content: President Trump revealed a shortlist of three potential Iranian leaders following the Supreme Leader's death in a US-Israel airstrike. He indicated US military action could extend for weeks, drawing parallels to Venezuela's transition model. Iran has appointed an interim leader, Ayatollah Alireza Arafi, as the nation navigates intense regional conflict and internal shifts.

title: Rupee falls to 91.32 against US dollar amid Middle East tensions
content: Rupee depreciated to 91.32 against the US dollar amid escalating Middle East tensions and global market volatility. Negative equity sentiment and significant foreign fund outflows further pressured the currency. Rising crude oil prices, driven by recent strikes in Iran, also contributed to market concerns, impacting India's import bill.

title: Man’s body found in biryani shop’s freezer in Lucknow
content: A shocking discovery was made in Lucknow's Bakshi Ka Talab area when a 35-year-old man's body was found inside a freezer at a biryani shop. Vijay Pal, a daily wager, was identified as the deceased. The shop had been closed for four days. Police are investigating, with the post-mortem unable to determine the exact cause of death.

title: Stable base and a chase in zen mode: How Sanju Samson unlocked his true potential
content: On Sunday, Sanju Samson delivered a defining 97 not out in a high-pressure T20 World Cup chase at the Eden Gardens. Years of watching greats like Kohli and Rohit from the dugout shaped his composure, while a stable base unlocked his power. It was a knock of high quality that may redefine his career.

title: When is the Lunar Eclipse in 2026? Date and timing in India (IST) - where to watch Chandra Grahan
content: India will witness the final stages of a lunar eclipse on March 3, 2026, coinciding with Holi. While the full eclipse occurs in the afternoon, the Moon will rise already partially obscured, offering a dimmed or shadowed view around sunset. Northeastern states may have a slightly longer viewing window.

title: IMD forecasts above-normal heatwave days in several states
content: India is bracing for an above-normal number of heatwave days between March and May, with several states expected to experience prolonged high temperatures. While March may see moderate temperatures in many regions, the IMD warns of significant risks to public health and essential services as summer intensifies.

title: Raising kids in this economy: To DINK or not? Why more couples are rethinking parenthood
content: Indian couples are increasingly opting out of parenthood due to escalating costs of education, housing, and healthcare, alongside environmental concerns and work-life balance challenges. Many embrace the DINK lifestyle or choose pets, prioritizing personal freedom and financial stability over the immense financial and emotional commitment of raising children in today's demanding world.

title: Unheeded wisdom and a materialistic superpower
content: Fans online have sparked fresh controversy by linking Taylor Swift’s recent lyrics and London visit to ex Joe Alwyn, dragging Travis Kelce into the debate. Social media theories question her artistic references and current relationship, though no evidence supports the claims. The episode highlights how Swift’s storytelling and high-profile romance continue to fuel speculation and intense fan scrutiny.

title: Gold prices jump 2% on Iran conflict; India braces for diamond supply crunch
content: Gold prices surged as major strikes on Iran, reportedly killing Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, intensified geopolitical tensions and fears of economic instability. The attacks triggered further retaliatory actions, creating a volatile environment that benefits gold as a safe-haven asset. Analysts predict continued price increases, with major banks forecasting gold to reach $6,000-$6,300 per ounce.

title: Holika Dahan 2026: Date, time, rituals, mantra and significance
content: Holi, the festival of colors, will be celebrated with grandeur in 2026. Holika Dahan is scheduled for March 3, 2026, followed by Rangwali Holi on March 4, 2026. The article details the significance of Holika Dahan, its puja rituals, and the importance of worshipping Kshetrapal. Devotees will perform specific rituals and chant mantras for blessings.

title: Bubble watch: Where things stand as conference tourneys loom
content: six automatic bids to the NCAA tournament will be awarded to the winners of the six conference tournaments . championship games will be scheduled for March 20 and March 21 . ten more teams will earn at-large spots determined by the NPI formula .

title: Khamenei Is Dead, So Who Is Directing Attacks By Iran On Gulf Countries?
content: The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC), Iran's elite force spearheading the counter-attack against the US and Israel, is acting independently, Iran's Foreign Minister has said, stressing that its attack on Oman "was not our choice".

title: Opinion: Opinion | 'Worst Day Of My Life': How Khamenei's Killing Has United Shias, Sunnis Globally
content: What Israel and the US have done is make Khamenei, who was running a country dealing with extreme economic hardships, protests and internal strife, a martyr.

title: US-Israel Attacks Iran LIVE Updates:PM Modi Expresses 'Deep Concern' Over Middle East Crisis, Calls for Dialogue
content: Israel Iran War Live Updates: Amid rapidly escalating tensions in the Middle East, Prime Minister Narendra Modi said the situation is "a matter of deep concern" for India, stressing that all disputes in the region must be resolved

title: How Iran Transformed From Secular Monarchy To Shia Islamic Republic
content: The United States and Israel's latest unilateral declaration of war on Iranian cities has drawn attention to the reality that Iran is not just another state in West Asia.

title: Uncertainty, Caution: Indians Await Flight Resumption Amid Middle East Chaos
content: From students stranded in Iran to anxious families at Indian airports, lakhs of people are navigating flight delays, cancellations, and airspace disruptions.

title: "Attack So Successful, Knocked Out Most Candidates": Trump On Iran Succession Question
content: What happens next in Iran? This urgent question that's on everybody's mind was put to US president Donald Trump after Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, Iran's supreme leader, died in a US and Israeli airstrike on Saturday.

title: What Iran's Clerical Hierarchy Looks Like After Khamenei's Death
content: Originating from the Arabic and Persian languages, the term Ayatollah symbolises a sign of god or religious authority. The title is granted to high-ranking clerics in Shia Islam to demonstrate their advanced theological knowledge in the community.

title: Centre Warns States Of Violence, Protests Amid Iran-Israel Tensions: Sources
content: The Ministry of Home Affairs, according to sources, has said that international developments could impact India's internal security, and security agencies should remain on high alert.

title: After Khamenei's Killing, Qom's Clerics Hold Key To Next Supreme Leader
content: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, Iran's Supreme Leader since 1989, was assassinated on Saturday by the United States and Israel, despite Tehran and Washington being in the middle of talks to reach a deal.

title: On Camera, US Destroys Iran's Parked Fighter Jets, Drones
content: As the military conflict in the Middle East spirals, the US is targeting Iranian aircraft and drone hangars. The US Central Command shared visuals of the strikes.

title: Texas Gunman Expressed 'Pro-Iranian Regime Sentiment': Intelligence Group
content: The gunman who killed two people and wounded 14 overnight in Austin, the capital of the US state of Texas, had expressed "pro-Iranian regime sentiment" on social media, the SITE Intelligence Group said.

title: Clouds Of Smoke Seen Rising From US Embassy In Kuwait After Iran Strikes
content: The US embassy in Kuwait said Monday that people should not come to the facility, as an AFP correspondent saw smoke rising from the diplomatic mission on Iran's third day of retaliatory Gulf attacks.

title: Pentagon Tells Congress No Sign That Iran Was Going To Attack US First: Report
content: Trump administration officials acknowledged in closed-door briefings with congressional staff that there was no intelligence suggesting Iran planned to attack U.S. forces first, two people familiar with the matter said.

title: Why Parsis Left Iran: Their Journey From Ancient Persia To India
content: Iran, the ancient homeland to the Parsis, is once again in the middle of a crisis after the recent US-Israel attack. Tehran has responded with attacks on US military bases in the Gulf countries.

title: Ajit Pawar's Son Shares Video Of VSR Ventures' Owner Sleeping In Cockpit
content: Jay Pawar shared a video that shows a man in civilian clothes, sleeping while seated in the left seat of the cockpit.

title: Bored Of Peace? Trump Keeps Choosing War
content: Trump has repeatedly declared himself to be a "President of Peace," boasted of his dealmaking ability in ending global conflicts, and complained of being cheated of the Nobel Peace Prize.

title: India Manufacturing Growth Hits 4-Month High In February, Exports Drop
content: India's factory activity expanded at its fastest pace in four months in February as strong domestic demand drove new orders.

title: 31 Killed As Israel Strikes Beirut After Hezbollah Fires Rockets, Drones
content: Israeli strikes on Lebanon have killed at least 31 people and wounded 149, the Lebanese health ministry said on Monday, as Israel's military threatened to intensify its attacks following Hezbollah rocket fire.

title: 'Scary, Surreal': UK Influencers Shelter In Dubai Basements Amid Iran Strikes
content: UK influencer Kate Ferdinand and entrepreneur Luisa Zissman slept in their basements with their children during Iran's missile strikes in Dubai. They described the experience as "scary" and "surreal".

title: Ranking MLB's best at every position for 2026: Olney's top 10s
content: ESPN's Buster Olney surveyed players around the industry to help him rank the top 10 players at every position . the objective of this exercise is to identify the best players for the 2026 season, not who might be best in five years or over their career .

title: 🏀 Win caps LeBron's father-daughter road trip
content: the lakers beat the Golden State Warriors 129-101 . leBron James was the first father-daughter road trip of his 23 years in the league . he said he was "good luck charm right here, 1-0" the first loss was a botched final play .

title: Sunday at the combine: Draft experts pick risers, standouts at every position
content: the offensive line prospects in the 2026 draft class had their on-field workouts at Lucas Oil Stadium . the top quarterbacks, running backs and wide receivers worked out Saturday . draft experts recapped all four days of the combine workouts .
